# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD
on:
  push:
    tags: true

jobs:
  build_and_release:
    name: Build and Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: 14

    - name: Install and build
      run: |
        npm install
        npm run build

    - name: Authenticate npm
      uses: npm/node-auth-token@v3.17.0
      id: auth
      with:
        npm_auth: $NPM_TOKEN

    - name: Publish to npm
      run: |
        npm publish --access public
      env:
        NPM_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')

    - uses: actions/setup-python@v2

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Authenticate PyPI
      uses: apache/pypi-auth-action@master
      id: authpy

    - name: Publish to PyPI
      run: |
        python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel
        twine upload dist/* --repository test
      env:
        TWINE_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.TWINE_USERNAME }}
        TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.TWINE_PASSWORD }}
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')

    - name: Create GitHub Release
      uses: actions/create-release@v2
      with:
        tag_name: ${{ github.ref }}
        release_name: ${{ github.ref }}
        draft: false
        prerelease: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')
        generate_changelog: false
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
